div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
POST /auth/sessions —
session for one auth-flow run
(expires_at = now + 10 min)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
last required step passed —
JWT access token + rotating
refresh token minted

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Retries of a failed attempt (below
max_attempts) and advance to the next
step both stay within IN_PROGRESS.
Each step has its own status:
PENDING, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED,
FAILED, SKIPPED, DELEGATED —
optional steps may be skipped.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Terminal states are one-way:
any further submission answers
HTTP 409 (state conflict).
Tokens are minted only on
COMPLETED — never before
the last step.
